SEARCH
Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http

Class MagicHttpClient

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicHttpClient
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class MagicHttpClient extends Object implements AutoCloseable
MagicUtils HTTP client with retries, config defaults, and JSON mapping.

    static final class 
    MagicHttpClient.Builder
    Builder for MagicHttpClient.

    downloadToFile(String path, Path target)
    Downloads content into a file.

    Downloads content into a file asynchronously.

    Downloads content into a file, switching to async on blocking-sensitive threads.

  • Method Details

    • builder

      public static MagicHttpClient.Builder builder(dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Platform platform, dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.config.ConfigManager configManager)
      Creates a builder that loads configuration from the provided manager.
      Parameters:
      platform - platform used for logging
      configManager - configuration manager used to register HttpClientConfig
      Returns:
      a new builder instance

    • builder

      public static MagicHttpClient.Builder builder(dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Platform platform)
      Creates a builder without auto-loading configuration.
      Parameters:
      platform - platform used for logging
      Returns:
      a new builder instance

    • config

      public HttpClientConfig config()
      Returns the resolved configuration instance.
      Returns:
      configuration used by the client

    • mapper

      public com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper mapper()
      Returns the configured Jackson mapper.
      Returns:
      JSON object mapper

    • request

      public HttpRequest.Builder request(String path)
      Creates a request builder with defaults (base URL, headers, timeouts).
      Parameters:
      path - absolute URL or a path resolved against base URL
      Returns:
      request builder

    • get

      public HttpResponse<String> get(String path) throws IOException, InterruptedException
      Sends a GET request and returns the response body as string.
      Parameters:
      path - absolute URL or a path resolved against base URL
      Returns:
      HTTP response with string body
      Throws:
      IOException - if request fails
      InterruptedException - if the thread is interrupted

    • getAsync

      public CompletableFuture<HttpResponse<String>> getAsync(String path)
      Sends a GET request asynchronously.
      Parameters:
      path - absolute URL or a path resolved against base URL
      Returns:
      future with response

    • getSmart

      public CompletableFuture<HttpResponse<String>> getSmart(String path)
      Sends a GET request, switching to async on blocking-sensitive threads.
      Parameters:
      path - absolute URL or a path resolved against base URL
      Returns:
      future with response

    • getJson

      public <T> T getJson(String path, Class<T> type) throws IOException, InterruptedException
      Sends a GET request and deserializes the JSON response into a type.
      Type Parameters:
      T - type of result
      Parameters:
      path - absolute URL or a path resolved against base URL
      type - target type
      Returns:
      deserialized response
      Throws:
      IOException - if request fails
      InterruptedException - if the thread is interrupted

    • getJsonAsync

      public <T> CompletableFuture<T> getJsonAsync(String path, Class<T> type)
      Sends a GET request asynchronously and deserializes JSON response.
      Type Parameters:
      T - type of result
      Parameters:
      path - absolute URL or a path resolved against base URL
      type - target type
      Returns:
      future with deserialized response

    • downloadToFile

      public HttpResponse<Path> downloadToFile(String path, Path target) throws IOException, InterruptedException
      Downloads content into a file.
      Parameters:
      path - absolute URL or a path resolved against base URL
      target - target file path
      Returns:
      HTTP response with file body
      Throws:
      IOException - if request fails
      InterruptedException - if the thread is interrupted

      public CompletableFuture<HttpResponse<Path>> downloadToFileAsync(String path, Path target)
      Downloads content into a file asynchronously.
      Parameters:
      path - absolute URL or a path resolved against base URL
      target - target file path
      Returns:
      future with file response

      Parameters:
      path - absolute URL or a path resolved against base URL
      target - target file path
      Returns:
      future with file response

    • send

      public <T> HttpResponse<T> send(HttpRequest request, HttpResponse.BodyHandler<T> handler) throws IOException, InterruptedException
      Sends a request using the underlying client without automatic retries.
      Type Parameters:
      T - body type
      Parameters:
      request - request to send
      handler - body handler
      Returns:
      HTTP response
      Throws:
      IOException - if request fails
      InterruptedException - if the thread is interrupted

      T - body type
      Parameters:
      request - request to send
      handler - body handler

      future with response
